set_budget_hint: Click any Budget cell above to set your targets, or click “Use actuals as budget” to start from this period’s numbers.
monthly_target_note: Targets are set monthly — shown here scaled to {period}.
click_month_hint: Click a month to drill in
ask_prompt: My budget vs actual for this period: Revenue actual {revActual} vs budget {revBudget} ({revVar}). Net profit actual {netActual} vs budget {netBudget} ({netVar}). What’s causing the variances and what should I focus on?
